Get postings by date range with pagination. Returns the same PostingDTO as /ledger/posting. Simplified endpoint for better performance. Fields and Changes are not supported. Token must have access to all vouchers in the company, otherwise a validation error is returned. If access control for salary information is activated, the token must have access to salary information as well.
Get VAT settings for the logged in company.

put.summary: Update VAT settings for the logged in company.
Create a new relative VAT Type. These are used if the company has 'forholdsmessig fradrag for inngående MVA'.

[BETA] Get the correction voucher for the opening balance.
[BETA] Get the voucher for the opening balance.

post.summary: [BETA] Add an opening balance on the given date.  All movements before this date will be 'zeroed out' in a separate correction voucher. The opening balance must have the first day of a month as the date, and it's also recommended to have the first day of the year as the date. If the postings provided don't balance the voucher, the difference will automatically be posted to a help account

delete.summary: [BETA] Delete the opening balance. The correction voucher will also be deleted

get.summary: Get voucher by ID.

put.summary: Update voucher. Postings with guiRow==0 will be deleted and regenerated.

post.summary: Upload attachment to voucher. If the voucher already has an attachment the content will be appended to the existing attachment as new PDF page(s). Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. Non PDF formats will be converted to PDF. Send as multipart form.

get.summary: Get PDF representation of voucher by ID.
Find vouchers based on the external voucher number.

post.summary: Upload a document to create one or more vouchers. Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. EHF/XML is possible with agreement with Tripletex. Send as multipart form.
Import GBAT10. Send as multipart form.

get.summary: Find non-posted vouchers.
Returns a data structure containing meta information about operations that are available for this voucher. Currently only implemented for DELETE: It is possible to check if the voucher is deletable.
Find vouchers corresponding with sent data.

post.summary: Add new voucher. IMPORTANT: Also creates postings. Only the gross amounts will be used. Amounts should be rounded to 2 decimals.

put.summary: Update multiple vouchers. Postings with guiRow==0 will be deleted and regenerated.
Reverses the voucher, and returns the reversed voucher. Supports reversing most voucher types, except salary transactions.

get.summary: Find vouchers in voucher reception.

post.summary: [BETA] Create one employee, based on import from external system. Validation is less strict, ie. employee department isn't required.

API endpoint for creating historical vouchers. These are vouchers created outside Tripletex, and should be from closed accounting years. The intended usage is to get access to historical transcations in Tripletex. Also creates postings. All amount fields in postings will be used. VAT postings must be included, these are not generated automatically like they are for normal vouchers in Tripletex. Requires the \"All vouchers\" and \"Advanced Voucher\" permissions.

put.summary: [BETA] Deletes all historical vouchers. Requires the "All vouchers" and "Advanced Voucher" permissions.

post.summary: Upload attachment to voucher. If the voucher already has an attachment the content will be appended to the existing attachment as new PDF page(s). Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. Non PDF formats will be converted to PDF. Send as multipart form.
